promos.promo: Make Moves: flex cash toward options with any lender or cash purchase, OR seller paid temporary buydown and/or closing costs via Taylor Morrison Home Funding
promos.note: The flex cash toward options path is NOT lender tied, which is unusual. The buydown/closing cost path requires Taylor Morrison Home Funding. Amounts vary by community; no hard expiration advertised. Verified on TM own regional offer page.

promos.promo: Up to 6% of sales price toward price reduction, interest rate promotion and/or closing costs on quick move in homes
promos.note: Total percentage and dollar amount vary by home. Seller contribution toward rate promo and closing costs is capped at agency limits of 3 to 6 percent depending on loan program and down payment. Verified on Pulte own Austin page disclaimer.

promos.promo: Rates as low as 4.99% (5.213% APR) plus up to $10K closing cost credit at Turners (Buda) and Flora (Hutto); 4.99% (5.768% APR) plus $10K closing credit at Lariat (Liberty Hill)
promos.note: Promotional buydown via Tri Pointe Connect. Advertised as-low-as rate; APR varies by community. No expiration posted. Separate from the closing-credit slate tracked in the companion entry.

promos.promo: Blue Ribbon Sales Event: 4.50% intro rate 7/6 ARM (5.5% APR) via Mission Mortgage, still advertised sitewide
promos.note: FLAGGED: the posted terms required contract on/after 4/16/26 and closing by 5/15/26 (FHA Yellow Ribbon variant by 5/30/26), so the advertised window ended over two months ago yet the event is still promoted on the homepage. Classic expired-but-displayed. Treat the 4.50% as an opening ask, not a live offer. Also note it is an ARM: fixed 7 years, adjusts every 6 months after.
